Let me show it back. Now I'm going to go back to the black box funnel because again I want to show how these things are all, it's building blocks, right? So the black box funnel, this is a whole new sales funnel we built. If you look close, it's just three funnels kind of bolted onto each other, right? First of the funnel, I have my free plus shipping CD. After I'm done with my free plus shipping CD, my upsell is my visible funnel. You go through that process and at the end of the visible funnel, I push them now to my coaching application funnel. Boom, that pops to the end. You guys see how I do that? So all these different funnels, all these things, all these building blocks, all these pieces you guys are all things that you just kind of build for your own business, okay? And every business is going to be different. So I can take this exact same thing and say, you know, for my business, I don't really have an application thing in the back, but I do have a webinar at the back. So I'm going to just plug the webinar funnel in the back here, boom. Or maybe I have this stuff, but I want to, I'm going to plug a microcontinuity thing in the first. I'm going to have a free CD, then plug in microcontinuity, and then I'm going to throw a coaching application in the back of that, or whatever it might be, okay? So I did this big webinar, man, six or seven months ago talking about the black box funnel. People are freaking out because it's a new cool thing. All it was just a building block, just a tweak on one of our other funnels. We took our free plus shipping thing, boom, up sold them there, and that was kind of the process. Does that make sense, you guys? Okay, so that's all we're kind of doing is taking all these pieces, all the different building blocks that I've been sharing with you guys, and figuring out different cool ways to arrange them, how to build them out to build a cool funnel, okay? A lot of people say, well, Russell, what's the very best funnel? I just want to do one of them. I only want to do one, okay? What I recommend is on the front, obviously, the front end, like we've talked about a lot, is having some kind of funnel that's a free plus shipping, free plus shipping with some upsells, right? It's a matter of your front end, we were driving initial traffic, but after they've come in here and they've joined your list, you've got to start getting good at doing a lot of the kind of funnels, because every single day I do a webinar to you, here's your webinar. Here's another webinar. Here's another webinar. What happens? The webinar becomes the pattern, okay? And as soon as you start seeing a pattern over and over and over again, you become desensitized to it, okay? And marketing, one of the biggest things that we always have to do is all pattern interrupts. How do we interrupt the pattern? So one day I come in and boom, I've got this huge automated webinar. It's awesome. We're going to come do it, and I get a huge response. Now, if I do the exact same thing two weeks later, the response is going to drop, because they just saw that. So how do I shift it up? Well, this time, instead of doing an automated webinar, let me put out the CD version of the webinar and build a little funnel and boom, now it's a pattern interrupt. Next time, I'm like, hey, guys, free CD, this thing's going to be awesome. Check it out, okay? Then the next promotion I do, I come back and I'm like, okay, I'm going to do an invisible funnel. This is a free CD webinar, but this one is so good. I can't get away for free like I did last one. This was a premium webinar, but what I'm going to do that's going to be really, really cool is that you come on for free and you get to judge me and tell me at the end if it's good. So this is what I'm going to do, an invisible funnel webinar, okay? The next time, I'm sure you do the product launch one, but maybe you've got this big new thing coming out, so I'm going to do a product launch, and then you do a product launch funnel. So you start learning how to incorporate these, and you can do a lot of different ones. You can try a bunch of them, but it's not really just like a one-time thing, okay? Your initial funnel is, we talked about it a lot yesterday, is your initial funnel, your goal is to break even. After you've broken even with that person, now we start taking through different sequences, different processes, different things to keep them engaged, keep them excited, keep them buying over and over and over and over again. That make sense? Hopefully? Okay. So that's the block. That's what I like about the block box is the fact that it's just a couple of other ones kind of built together. Who here signed up or bought the block box when I went through that whole process? Who here has watched the four-hour webinar? Hopefully most of you guys have watched that at this point. Okay? So you guys have seen kind of what we do in the internal teaching and you've seen the whole process. But again, all it is is just a blend of a couple of different funnels put together.
